name: E-5 inline suppression: a directive naming a different rule-id does not suppress this rule's violation
command: printf 'eval("x"); // rubric-disable-line no-alert -- unrelated\n' > in.js && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/inline-suppression.sh" --rule no-eval --in in.js 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q '\[no-eval\] violation' err.txt && echo not_suppressed 1>&2
